provenance.text: SmartLists that hold Scarab token objects. A Scarab is a singleton with a type (Reroll, Pip, Die). Moves from Supply to Player on gain, destroyed on spend.
provenance.title: work:Scarab Containers

provenance.text: SmartLists that hold Tile objects. A Tile is a singleton with child Ability objects. When a tile moves from Market to Player, it's the same object â€” just on a different SmartList.
provenance.title: work:Tile Containers

provenance.text: Runtime object containers for Favor of the Pharaoh. Each SmartList here is an actual container that holds singleton game objects. Objects can live on multiple SmartLists simultaneously. Destroying an object removes it from all lists. Destroying a parent cascades to its children (e.g., removing a Tile removes its Abilities from every list they appear on).
provenance.title: work:FotP-SmartLists

provenance.text: SmartLists that hold Player objects. A Player is a singleton that appears on multiple lists simultaneously.
provenance.title: work:Player Containers

provenance.text: SmartLists that hold Ability objects. An Ability is a singleton child of a Tile. The same Ability object can appear on multiple lists (e.g., both under its parent Tile and on the Available Abilities list).
provenance.title: work:Ability Containers

provenance.text: SmartLists that hold Die objects. A Die is a singleton that moves between zone SmartLists as the turn progresses. The same Die object is never duplicated â€” it's just on different lists at different times.
provenance.title: work:Die Containers

provenance.text: Circular SmartList of Player objects in clockwise seating order. Head = start player. The game loop iterates this list each round. During roll-off, this same list is walked but skipping eliminated players.
provenance.title: work:Turn Order

provenance.text: SmartList of Die objects that have been rolled but not yet locked. Player interacts with these: locking, scarab use, ability targets. After locking, a die moves from Active to Locked.
provenance.title: work:Active Dice

provenance.text: Filtered view / sub-SmartList of Player Owned Tiles containing only red tiles. Each has used/unused state. Destroying a used artifact removes it and cascades to its Ability children.
provenance.title: work:Player Owned Red (Artifacts)

provenance.text: Each Tile has a SmartList of its child Ability objects. This is the ownership relationship. If the Tile is destroyed, these Abilities cascade-delete from all lists. A tile may have multiple abilities with different trigger types.
provenance.title: work:Tile Abilities (parent-child)

provenance.text: Filtered view / sub-SmartList of Player Owned Tiles containing only yellow tiles. Used for the restriction: one yellow per level.
provenance.title: work:Player Owned Yellow (Populace)

provenance.text: SmartList of Die objects locked into the pyramid. Ordered by lock sequence. Their pip values are summed for criteria checking and roll-off scoring. Only standard numeric values count.
provenance.title: work:Locked Dice

provenance.text: SmartList of Die objects whose values have been fixed by abilities (Tomb Builder, Astrologer, etc). These bypass normal rolling. The Die singleton is on this list AND on Active or Locked.
provenance.title: work:Set Dice

provenance.text: SmartList of Ability objects that can be activated this turn. Populated at Start of Turn from all owned tiles' abilities. When an ability is used (once-per-turn), it's removed from this list. Same Ability singletons that live under their parent Tiles.
provenance.title: work:Available Abilities This Turn

provenance.text: SmartList of Ability objects that can be activated this roll. Subset of Available Abilities This Turn for once-per-roll abilities. Reset (repopulated from Available Abilities This Turn) at the start of each roll within the turn.
provenance.title: work:Available Abilities This Roll

provenance.text: SmartList of Ability objects triggered by custom dice faces landing on special values (Artisan *, Intrigue **, Voyage faces, Decree *). Populated after a roll. Player resolves each one, removing it from the list as it's consumed.
provenance.title: work:Pending Custom Dice Abilities

provenance.text: SmartList of Die objects created during the turn from +1 Die tokens or tile abilities. These are singletons that exist only for the current turn. At End of Turn, they're destroyed â€” which cascade-removes them from Cup, Active, Locked, or wherever they ended up.
provenance.title: work:Temporary Dice

provenance.text: SmartList of Scarab objects this player holds. When spent, the Scarab is destroyed (removed from this list). Could also return to Supply Pool if the design prefers recycling over destruction.
provenance.title: work:Player Scarabs

provenance.text: Filtered view / sub-SmartList of Player Owned Tiles containing only blue tiles. One blue per level restriction.
provenance.title: work:Player Owned Blue (Priesthood)

provenance.text: SmartList of all Die objects this player owns. Permanent across turns. Starts with 3 standard red dice. Grows when tiles grant custom dice (Serf->orange, Noble Adoption->yellow, etc). The pool is the authoritative ownership list; zone lists are views into it.
provenance.title: work:Player Dice Pool

provenance.text: SmartList of Player objects who can still compete in the roll-off. Subset of Turn Order. Players whose max possible score < Pharaoh target are removed. Same Player singletons as Turn Order.
provenance.title: work:Roll-Off Eligible Players

provenance.text: SmartList of Tile objects this player has claimed. The same Tile singleton that was on a Market Stack. Grows over the game. Each Tile carries its child Abilities with it. Used to derive bonus dice, available abilities, and claiming restrictions.
provenance.title: work:Player Owned Tiles

provenance.text: SmartList of Ability objects that have been triggered by a game state transition (StartOfTurn, AfterRoll, LockedAny, AllLocked, Acquire, etc). Populated by FireTriggers(). Processed in order, then cleared. Same singletons as the Tile's children.
provenance.title: work:Triggered Abilities Queue

provenance.text: One SmartList per bar slot. LIFO stack of Tile objects. Top tile is claimable. When a player claims the top tile, it's popped from this stack and pushed onto the player's Owned Tiles list. When the stack is empty, the slot is exhausted. There are ~20-30 of these stacks in a game (varies by bar configuration).
provenance.title: work:Market Stack (per bar slot)

provenance.text: Three SmartLists (one per type) holding unowned Scarab objects. When a player gains a token, the Scarab moves from here to the player's Scarab list. Finite supply: 31 reroll, 31 pip, 3 die.
provenance.title: work:Scarab Supply Pool

provenance.text: SmartList of Die objects available to roll. At turn start, all dice from Player Dice Pool + temporary bonus dice are here. As dice are locked, they leave this list. When empty, player cannot roll.
provenance.title: work:Dice in Cup
